message:
feat(cli): recognize Cursor, Windsurf, and Aider agent types across CLI

Expand agent type recognition to include three additional AI coding
agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Aider) alongside Claude, Codex, and Gemini:

- completion_helpers.go: listAgentIDs() includes new agent types
- controller.go: buildControllerResponse() counts new agent types
- send.go: runInterrupt() and buildInterruptResponse() target new types;
  getAgentTypeShort() returns "cursor"/"windsurf"/"aider" with fallback
  to raw string instead of "?" for unknown types
- get_all_session_text.go: getText recognizes new agent types
- send.go: fix off-by-one in batch prompt display counter (i+1 → i+2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -176,7 +176,16 @@ func getAgentTypeShort(agentType tmux.AgentType) string {
 		return "gmi"
 	case tmux.AgentUser:
 		return "user"
+	case tmux.AgentCursor:
+		return "cursor"
+	case tmux.AgentWindsurf:
+		return "windsurf"
+	case tmux.AgentAider:
+		return "aider"
 	default:
+		if s := string(agentType); s != "" {
+			return s
+		}
 		return "?"
 	}
 }
